info.title: rabbitmq-transport
info.description: A .NET global tool to manage the RabbitMQ transport for NServiceBus endpoints

commands.name: delays
commands.description: Commands to manage the queues and exchanges for the NServiceBus delay infrastructure

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: create
commands.description: Create v2 delay infrastructure queues and exchanges

options.name: --connectionString
options.description: Force this command to use the specified connection string

options.name: --connectionStringEnv
options.description: Specifies the environment variable where the connection string can be found. --connectionString, if specified, will take precedence over this option. [default: RabbitMQTransport_ConnectionString]

options.name: --managementApiUrl
options.description: Overrides the value inferred from the connection string

options.name: --managementApiUserName
options.description: Overrides the value inferred from the connection string. If provided, --managementApiPassword must also be provided or this option will be ignored.

options.name: --managementApiPassword
options.description: Overrides the value inferred from the connection string. If provided, --managementApiUserName must also be provided or this option will be ignored.

options.name: --certPath
options.description: Set the path to the client certificate file for connecting to the broker

options.name: --certPassphrase
options.description: The passphrase for client certificate file for when using a client certificate

options.name: --disableCertValidation
options.description: Disable remote certificate validation when connecting to the broker

options.name: --useExternalAuth
options.description: Use the external authorization option when connecting to the broker

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.description: Set the path to the client certificate file for connecting to the broker

options.name: --certPassphrase
options.description: The passphrase for client certificate file for when using a client certificate

options.name: --disableCertValidation
options.description: Disable remote certificate validation when connecting to the broker

options.name: --useExternalAuth
options.description: Use the external authorization option when connecting to the broker

options.name: --routingTopology
options.description: Specifies which routing topology to use. [default: Conventional]

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: endpoint
commands.description: Commands to manage the infrastructure for an NServiceBus endpoint

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: create
commands.description: Create queues and exchanges for an endpoint

options.name: --connectionString
options.description: Force this command to use the specified connection string

options.name: --connectionStringEnv
options.description: Specifies the environment variable where the connection string can be found. --connectionString, if specified, will take precedence over this option. [default: RabbitMQTransport_ConnectionString]

options.name: --managementApiUrl
options.description: Overrides the value inferred from the connection string

options.name: --managementApiUserName
options.description: Overrides the value inferred from the connection string. If provided, --managementApiPassword must also be provided or this option will be ignored.

options.name: --managementApiPassword
options.description: Overrides the value inferred from the connection string. If provided, --managementApiUserName must also be provided or this option will be ignored.

options.name: --certPath
options.description: Set the path to the client certificate file for connecting to the broker

options.name: --certPassphrase
options.description: The passphrase for client certificate file for when using a client certificate

options.name: --disableCertValidation
options.description: Disable remote certificate validation when connecting to the broker

options.name: --useExternalAuth
options.description: Use the external authorization option when connecting to the broker

options.name: --routingTopology
options.description: Specifies which routing topology to use. [default: Conventional]

options.name: --useDurableEntities
options.description: Specifies if entities should be created as durable

options.name: --queueType
options.description: Specifies queue type will be used for queue creation [default: Quorum]

options.name: --errorQueueName
options.description: Also create an error queue with the specified name

options.name: --auditQueueName
options.description: Also create an audit queue with the specified name

options.name: --instanceDiscriminators
options.description: An optional list of instance discriminators to use when the endpoint needs uniquely addressable instances

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

arguments.name: endpointName
arguments.description: The name of the endpoint to create
